title: Clarks Cool Briefcase Mod
description: Ever wanted to be a business person? No, me neither.
body:
Ever wanted to be a business person? No, me neither. Like the name of the mod suggests it adds briefcases to Minecraft. These can be used for extra storage in the inventory. More briefcases are planned. 

Submit any feedback or ideas here: https://forms.gle/pbdRYHhyt2YpHMmq5

The "Ocean Briefcase" gives you buffs while you are in water.

The "Lava Briefcase" gives you buffs while you are in lava.

The "Explosive Briefcase" explodes.

The "Million Dollar Briefcase."

Cooked Briefcase, oddly nutritious.
